title: Donut Gauge (Apple Rings)
description: Fun apple watch style visualisation of percentage values.

inputs.name: measure_1
inputs.description: First percentage value to render as the outer ring. Supply as a decimal between 0 and 1.

inputs.name: measure_2
inputs.description: Second percentage value to render as the middle ring. Supply as a decimal between 0 and 1.

inputs.name: measure_3
inputs.description: Third percentage value to render as the inner ring. Supply as a decimal between 0 and 1.
